productDisplayName: Peter England Unisex Casual Olive Wallet
description: Crafted from soft, genuine leather, this wallet from peter england is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed international male. Peter England perfects this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes with its classic techniques and innovative designs. Carry your monetary essentials with ease in this classic piece.Dimensions: 11.9 cm X 9.3 cmHas two main compartmentsFour credit card slots on the left side of the walletTwo slip pockets for coins on either sideOne buttoned pocket on the right sideOne pockets on either sideBranding embossed on the frontCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
